# LLM-WIKI Standard

## Summary

- LLM-WIKI Standard is a project for creating and validating source-backed wiki documentation.
- It supports [[Knowledge Editor]] workflows and [[Prompt Command API]] prompts.

## Scope

- Provides CLI validation and templates.
- Keeps AI-created knowledge in `needs_review`.

## Evidence

- package.json

- Fixture document for OKF v0.1 validation.
